channel.title: dangerous on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in dangerous on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: Diy Spin Art
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: Before I start, let me say that everything in this blog is stupid. You should not do the things I report on here. What I did will likely cause damage to property and possibly great harm to your person. That is, you might get hurt or die. You have been warned. With that, let’s get to the fun. This started with a project my wife started with the family. She brought several wooden snowflake cutouts to paint as a family project.
